statements.select: SELECT a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, (select b.EduName from Edu b WHERE a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel) AS EduLevelHighest_Name, (select c1.EduName from Edu c1 WHERE a.EduLevel1=c1.EduLevel) AS EduLevel1_Name, (select c2.EduName from Edu c2 WHERE a.EduLevel2=c2.EduLevel) AS EduLevel2_Name, (select c3.EduName from Edu c3 WHERE a.EduLevel3=c3.EduLevel) AS EduLevel3_Name, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.ExpertiseCode, ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r1 ON r1.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE())-1 as varchar(4)) and r1.IDNO=a.IDNO LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r2 ON r2.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE()) as varchar(4)) and r2.IDNO=a.IDNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT a.IndustryMstCode AS MSTID, a.IndustryCode AS DETID, b.IndustryName AS MSTNAME, a.IndustryName AS DETNAME FROM IndustryDet a LEFT JOIN IndustryMst b ON a.IndustryMstCode=b.IndustryCode WHERE a.Actived='Y' AND b.Actived='Y' ORDER BY a.OrderBy, b.OrderBy

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tmp.UpdatedDatetime DESC, tmp.UnitCode) AS ROWID,* FROM ( SELECT a.Year, a.PlanCode, a.PlanID, a.PlanID AS TrainID, '' AS ClassID, '1' AS PlanTypeCode,'大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText, a.UnitCode, a.UnitName, a.TeacherID, a.SchoolName AS ApplyUnit, a.SchoolName AS TrainingUnit, a.ClassName, a.TrainingDateS, a.TrainingDateE, a.ClassDateS, a.ClassDateE, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.TeachHours, a.TeachNum, a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, CAST(CAST( CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF((CAST(ISNULL(Q1 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q2 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q3 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q4 ,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(Q5 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q6 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q7 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q8 ,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(Q9 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q10,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4,1,0)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) / CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT)*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) AS Satisfy, CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) AS FillStudentNum FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE a.TeacherID = #LoginIDNO# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=a.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#Year# AND a.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND a.SchoolName LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND a.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND a.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
UNION ALL SELECT b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID, '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_S(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_S(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) FillStudentNum FROM dbo.FNTB_TransData_S_Class(#LoginIDNO#) b WHERE b.TeacherID=#LoginIDNO# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
UNION ALL SELECT b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID,convert(nvarchar(50),b.ClassID) ClassID, '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_K(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_K(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) FillStudentNum FROM dbo.TransData_K_Class b WHERE b.TeacherID=#LoginIDNO# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
) tmp ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tmp.UpdatedDatetime DESC, tmp.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC, a.UnitCode) AS ROWID, a.Year, a.PlanCode, a.PlanID, a.PlanID AS TrainID, '' AS ClassID, '1' AS PlanTypeCode,'大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText, a.UnitCode, a.UnitName, a.TeacherID, a.SchoolName AS ApplyUnit, a.SchoolName AS TrainingUnit, a.ClassName, a.TrainingDateS, a.TrainingDateE, a.ClassDateS, a.ClassDateE, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.TeachHours, a.TeachNum, a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, CAST(CAST( CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(( CAST(ISNULL(Q1 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q2 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q3 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q4 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q5 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q6 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q7 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q8 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q9 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q10,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4,1,0)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) / CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT)*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) AS Satisfy, CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) AS FillStudentNum FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE a.TeacherID = #LoginIDNO# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=a.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#Year# AND a.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND a.SchoolName LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND a.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND a.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC, a.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID ,b.Year, b.PlanCode ,b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID ,'2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText ,b.UnitCode, b.UnitName ,b.TeacherID,b.TeacherName ,b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit ,b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit ,b.ClassName ,b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS ,b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE ,b.ClassDateS ,b.ClassDateE ,b.JobAbilityCode ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.TeachHours ,b.TeachNum ,b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_S(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) Satisfy ,dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_S(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) FillStudentNum FROM dbo.FNTB_TransData_S_Class(#LoginIDNO#) b WHERE b.TeacherID=#LoginIDNO# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID ,b.Year, b.PlanCode ,b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID,convert(nvarchar(50),b.ClassID) ClassID ,'3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText ,b.UnitCode, b.UnitName ,b.TeacherID,b.TeacherName ,b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit ,b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit ,b.ClassName ,b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS ,b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE ,b.ClassDateS ,b.ClassDateE ,b.JobAbilityCode ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.TeachHours ,b.TeachNum ,b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_K(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) Satisfy ,dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_K(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) FillStudentNum FROM dbo.TransData_K_Class b WHERE b.TeacherID=#LoginIDNO# AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

SELECT d.Year ,d.PlanCode ,d.UnitCode ,d.TrainID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassName ,d.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherName ,d.StudentID /*PK*/ ,d.StudentName ,d.PersonWorkExp ,d.DutyType ,d.FillDate /*PK*/ ,d.Q1,d.Q2,d.Q3,d.Q4,d.Q5,d.Q6,d.Q7,d.Q8,d.Q9,d.Q10,d.Q11 ,d.Suggest ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, d.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_S_Satisfy d JOIN TransData_S_Class b on d.Year=b.Year AND d.TrainID=b.TrainID AND d.ClassID=b.ClassID AND d.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND d.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# and b.CourseUnitCode=#CourseUnitCode# and b.ClassDateS=#ClassDateS# ORDER BY d.UpdatedDatetime DESC

SELECT d.Year ,d.PlanCode ,d.UnitCode ,d.TrainID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassName ,d.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherName ,d.StudentID /*PK*/ ,d.StudentName ,d.PersonWorkExp ,d.DutyType ,d.FillDate /*PK*/ ,d.Q1,d.Q2,d.Q3,d.Q4,d.Q5,d.Q6,d.Q7,d.Q8,d.Q9,d.Q10,d.Q11 ,d.Suggest ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, d.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_K_Satisfy d JOIN TransData_K_Class b on d.Year=b.Year AND d.TrainID=b.TrainID AND d.ClassID=b.ClassID AND d.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND d.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# and b.CourseUnitCode=#CourseUnitCode# and b.ClassDateS=#ClassDateS# ORDER BY d.UpdatedDatetime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID, b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID, '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_S(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_S(b.TeacherID ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.ClassDateS) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_S_Class b WHERE b.TeacherID=#LoginIDNO#
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingName, a.MeetingType, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, ISNULL(a.MeetingDateS, ''), 111) + IIF(ISNULL(a.MeetingDateE, '') = '', '', ' ~ ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR, ISNULL(a.MeetingDateE, ''), 111)) AS MeetingDate*/ CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Location, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120) AS SignUpDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120) AS SignUpDateE, (SELECT COUNT(Seq) FROM MeetingSignUp aa WHERE aa.MeetingSeq=a.Seq AND aa.TeacherAccount=#LoginAccount#) AS isSignUp, IIF(GETDATE()>=a.SignUpDateS AND GETDATE()<=a.SignUpDateE,1,0) AS isCanSignUp FROM Meeting a WHERE 1=1
AND a.MeetingType = #MeetingType# AND a.MeetingName LIKE '%' + #MeetingName# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 112) >= #MeetingDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 112) <= #MeetingDateE# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 112) >= #SignUpDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 112) <= #SignUpDateE# $CreatedUnit_forSQL$
$IsSignUpStop_forSQL$
ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC

SELECT a.Seq, CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) AS MeetingDate, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS a.MeetingDateS,*/ /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS a.MeetingDateE,*/ SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) + ' ~ ' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS MeetingTime, /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateS,*/ /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateE,*/ CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) AS SignUpDateTime, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.Address, a.Days, a.MaximumPeople, b.UnitName AS UnitName, a.Remark, a.PicName, (SELECT COUNT(Seq) FROM MeetingSignUp aa WHERE aa.MeetingSeq=a.Seq AND aa.TeacherAccount=#LoginAccount#) AS isSignUp, IIF(GETDATE()>=a.SignUpDateS AND GETDATE()<=a.SignUpDateE,1,0) AS isCanSignUp FROM Meeting a LEFT JOIN Unit b ON a.CreatedUnit=b.UnitCode WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingAttached a WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.Seq) AS ROWID, b.Seq, b.MeetingType, b.MeetingName, b.CreatedUnit, c.UnitName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, b.Location, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.SignUpDateS, 120) AS SignUpDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.SignUpDateE, 120) AS SignUpDateE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDatetime, 120) AS SignUpDatetime, '已報名' AS SignUpStr, ISNULL(d.Attend,'N') AS isAttend, ISNULL(d.TestPassed,'N') AS isTestPassed, d.TestScore FROM MeetingSignUp a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq LEFT JOIN Unit c ON b.CreatedUnit=c.UnitCode LEFT JOIN MeetingAttend d ON d.MeetingSeq=b.Seq AND d.TeacherAccount=a.TeacherAccount WHERE a.TeacherAccount=#LoginAccount#
statements.delete: DELETE FROM MeetingSignUp WHERE MeetingSeq=#MeetingSeq# AND TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#
DELETE FROM MeetingAttend WHERE MeetingSeq=#MeetingSeq# AND TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#
statements.select: SELECT a.Seq, CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) AS MeetingDate, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS a.MeetingDateS,*/ /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS a.MeetingDateE,*/ SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) + ' ~ ' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS MeetingTime, /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateS,*/ /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateE,*/ CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) AS SignUpDateTime, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.MaximumPeople, b.UnitName AS UnitName, a.Remark, a.PicName FROM Meeting a LEFT JOIN Unit b ON a.CreatedUnit=b.UnitCode WHERE 1=1 AND a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingAttached a WHERE 1=1 AND a.MeetingSeq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.TeacherAccount, a.ReportType, a.JobAbilityCode, a.ReportName, a.FileNameRemark, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.Year, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM ReportRecord a WHERE a.ReportType='1' AND a.TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#
AND a.Year = #Year#
ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC

SELECT CONCAT(DATEPART(YEAR, DateS)-1911,'/',DATEPART(MONTH, DateS),'/',DATEPART(DAY, DateS) ,' ~ ',DATEPART(YEAR, DateE)-1911,'/',DATEPART(MONTH, DateE),'/',DATEPART(DAY, DateE)) Result FROM Report WHERE Year=#Year# AND UnitCode=#UnitID#
SELECT DateS, DateE FROM Report WHERE Year=#Year# AND UnitCode=#UnitID#
SELECT a.Seq, a.Attend, a.TestPassed FROM MeetingAttend a JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE a.TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount# AND b.Year=#Year# AND b.MeetingType='1'

SELECT COUNT(a.Seq) AS MeetingCount FROM Meeting a LEFT JOIN MeetingAttend b ON a.Seq=b.MeetingSeq WHERE a.Year=#Year# AND a.MeetingType='2' AND a.CreatedUnit=#CreatedUnit# AND b.Attend='Y' AND b.TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#

SELECT a.Seq FROM SelfReport a WHERE 1=1 AND a.AuditStatus='Y' AND a.TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount# AND YEAR(a.FirstTime)=#Year# AND a.FirstTime>=(SELECT DateS FROM Report WHERE Year=#Year# AND UnitCode=#UnitCode#) AND a.FirstTime<=(SELECT DateE FROM Report WHERE Year=#Year# AND UnitCode=#UnitCode#)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.Year, a.UnitCode, a.TeacherAccount, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.OBJECT_TYPE, a.StudNum, a.TObject, a.TMethod, a.TslidesOrg, a.TslidesNew, a.TslidesType, a.Other, a.StudyGReportOrg, a.StudyGReportNew, a.StudyGReportType, a.WorksheetsOrg, a.WorksheetsNew, a.WorksheetsType, a.HomeWorkOrg, a.HomeWorkNew, a.HomeWorkType, a.ExpReportOrg, a.ExpReportNew, a.ExpReportType, a.ExamOrg, a.ExamNew, a.ExamType, a.Other1Org, a.Other1New, a.Other1Type, a.Other1Remark, a.Other2Org, a.Other2New, a.Other2Type, a.Other2Remark, a.Effect, a.PlanImprove, a.ExamImprove, a.materialsImprove, a.Other3, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM SelfReport a WHERE 1=1 AND a.TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#
AND a.Year = #Year#
ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC

SELECT a.Seq, a.Caption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateS, 120) AS DateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateE, 120) AS DateE, a.IsOnTop, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Notices a WHERE 1=1
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateS, 112) >= #DateS_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateS, 112) <= #DateS_B# AND a.Caption LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%'
ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.DateS DESC, a.DateE DESC, a.Caption

SELECT a.Seq, a.NoticesSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM NoticesAttached a WHERE a.NoticesSeq=#Seq#

SELECT a.Year /*PK*/ ,a.PlanCode ,a.UnitCode ,a.UnitName ,a.PlanID /*PK*/ ,a.SchoolName ,a.ClassName ,a.TrainingDateS ,a.TrainingDateE ,a.ClassDateS /*PK*/ ,a.ClassDateE ,a.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,a.TeacherName ,a.JobAbilityCode ,a.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,a.TeachHours ,a.TeachNum ,a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=YEAR(GETDATE())

SELECT TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, MAX(UpdatedDatetime), 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,MAX([Year]) Year ,MAX(PlanCode) PlanCode ,MAX(TrainID) TrainID ,MIN(ClassID) ClassID ,MAX(UnitCode) UnitCode ,MAX(UnitName) UnitName ,MAX(JoinCompany) JoinCompany ,MAX(TrainingUnit) TrainingUnit ,MAX(TrainingTimeE) TrainingTimeE ,MAX(ClassDateE) ClassDateE ,MAX(JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(TeachHours) TeachHours ,MAX(TeachNum) TeachNum ,MAX(QuestLink) QuestLink FROM TransData_S_Class WHERE TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND Year=YEAR(GETDATE()) GROUP BY TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS

SELECT TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, MAX(UpdatedDatetime), 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,MAX([Year]) Year ,MAX(PlanCode) PlanCode ,MAX(TrainID) TrainID ,MIN(ClassID) ClassID ,MAX(UnitCode) UnitCode ,MAX(UnitName) UnitName ,MAX(JoinCompany) JoinCompany ,MAX(TrainingUnit) TrainingUnit ,MAX(TrainingTimeE) TrainingTimeE ,MAX(ClassDateE) ClassDateE ,MAX(JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(TeachHours) TeachHours ,MAX(TeachHours_X) TeachHours_X ,MAX(TeachNum) TeachNum ,MAX(QuestLink) QuestLink FROM TransData_K_Class WHERE TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND Year=YEAR(GETDATE()) GROUP BY TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS

WITH WT1 AS ( select COUNT(CASE WHEN (CAST(0 AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q1,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q2,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q3,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q4,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q5,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q6,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q7,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q8,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q9,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q10,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4 THEN 1 END) SatisfyQ,COUNT(1) StudCNT FROM TransData_D_Class a JOIN TransData_D_Satisfy ds on ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID WHERE a.TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=YEAR(GETDATE()) ) SELECT CASE WHEN StudCNT >0 THEN CAST(CAST( 1.0*SatisfyQ/StudCNT*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) END Satisfy FROM WT1

WITH WT1 AS (select COUNT(CASE WHEN (CAST(0 AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q1,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q2,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q3,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q4,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q5,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q6,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q7,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q8,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q9,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q10,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q11,'0') AS FLOAT))/11>=4 THEN 1 END) SatisfyQ,COUNT(1) StudCNT FROM TransData_S_Satisfy ds JOIN TransData_S_Class b on ds.Year=b.Year AND ds.TrainID=b.TrainID AND ds.ClassID=b.ClassID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# and b.Year=YEAR(GETDATE()) ) SELECT CASE WHEN StudCNT >0 THEN CAST(CAST( 1.0*SatisfyQ/StudCNT*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) END Satisfy FROM WT1

WITH WT1 AS (select COUNT(CASE WHEN (CAST(0 AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q1,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q2,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q3,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q4,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q5,0) AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q6,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q7,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q8,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q9,0) AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q10,0) AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(ds.Q11,0) AS FLOAT))/11>=4 THEN 1 END) SatisfyQ,COUNT(1) StudCNT FROM TransData_K_Satisfy ds JOIN TransData_K_Class b on ds.Year=b.Year AND ds.TrainID=b.TrainID AND ds.ClassID=b.ClassID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# and b.Year=YEAR(GETDATE()) ) SELECT CASE WHEN StudCNT >0 THEN CAST(CAST( 1.0*SatisfyQ/StudCNT*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) END Satisfy FROM WT1
